<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This interface is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ interface IsolatedTestRunner { public function run(TestCase $test, bool $runEntireClass, bool $preserveGlobalState, bool $requiresXdebug): void; }
